crime.value: Multiple murders - Kane stabs Sam in the woods and kills Alex by breaking his neck in mental hospital
crime.quote: he turned around and got a knife to the chest he fell to the ground

victim.value: Sam and Alex - Sam follows Kane into woods despite her violent reputation, Alex is Kane's roommate at mental hospital
victim.quote: It's your fault to follow a crazy kid into the woods you slave!

culprit_and_motive.value: Kane commits murders, appears to kill for psychological satisfaction/thrill rather than rational motive
culprit_and_motive.quote: she left him looking dead on the floor, she got on the other bed and took a nap happy with herself

investigator.value: Police officers who question Kane and take her to mental hospital, but no sustained investigation shown
investigator.quote: What do you mean?'' The policeman scowled.

red_herring.value: Kane's initial misdirection about seeing blood due to 'girl thing/puberty' when questioned by police about her unusual reaction
red_herring.quote: It's a.... a..... a girl thing! Yes a girl thing, you know, puberty..... puberty, and stuff?

clue_fairness.value: Kane's disturbing creative writing story foreshadows her actual murderous behavior - both reader and characters witness this early clue
clue_fairness.quote: I ate a sandwich and I went outside to go kill my friend because she's a big brat, so I killed her

social_world.value: Institutional authority structures: school expulsions, parental control, police intervention, and mental hospital confinement
social_world.quote: Kane this is the 8th school you got kicked out of, what is it this time

reveal_mechanic.value: Physical evidence and Kane's own behavioral inconsistencies expose her guilt - her unusual blood tolerance and nervous responses
reveal_mechanic.quote: Well, I see blood a lot so... Kane paused and started to sweat, she wasn't thinking about what she was saying
